s: Global tech trends, fast-picked by AI.
d:
Global tech trends, fast-picked by AI.

Trending AI aggregates three major tech sources — GitHub Trending, Hacker News, and Product Hunt — into one place, with AI-powered summaries and daily picks so you can discover the most noteworthy projects across the web without the noise.

FEATURES

- Multi-source aggregation — browse GitHub Trending, Hacker News, and Product Hunt in a single app.
- AI summaries — every project gets an automatic AI analysis so you grasp its core value at a glance.
- Daily Picks — AI curates the most noteworthy tech projects from across the web, every day.
- Historical records — jump to the trending list of any date and never miss a day.
- Bilingual — full English and Simplified Chinese, following your app language setting.
- Share to AI — send any item straight to your favorite AI app for deeper reading.
- Material 3 design with light and dark themes.

Built with Kotlin Multiplatform and Compose Multiplatform. Source on GitHub at HarlonWang/TrendingAI.
